summary: Append the authoritative hosted replacement evidence for the exact checksum-verified macOS DMG and Linux AppImage artifacts without rewriting the earlier installer decision entry.

externalInputs.purpose: Authoritative hosted replacement run for the corrected exact candidate and its retained DMG/AppImage artifacts.

decisions.topic: Append-only acceptance of hosted installer artifact evidence
decisions.decision: Treat a hosted installer result as retained M3 evidence only after the exact artifact filename, byte length, and SHA-256 sidecar have been independently verified, while continuing to label macOS signing and notarization as owner-side pending work.
decisions.rationale: The earlier append-only installer entry correctly left hosted replacement evidence pending. A separate entry preserves that historical truth while binding the later successful artifacts to the authoritative run and preventing an unsigned artifact from being described as signed or notarized.

testEvidence.criterion: Hosted CI produces exact, checksum-verified macOS DMG and Linux AppImage artifacts from the corrected candidate.
testEvidence.test: Inspect authoritative GitHub Actions run 29533256318 at commit d027c284, download both hosted artifacts, and independently verify each payload against its SHA-256 sidecar including the exact filename.

red.outcome: RED: the first hosted candidate produced a DMG but no AppImage because the Linux bundler rejected the missing square-icon configuration.

green.command: GitHub Actions run 29533256318 artifact download and independent SHA-256 sidecar verification
green.outcome: GREEN: artifact 8389552093 contained ScadMill_0.0.0_amd64.AppImage (82,541,048 bytes), matching sidecar SHA-256 FBC1E8B1542485DEA0C613E507CC7036B1B4140B4B3D4BA8ABB40D0850C6E720. Artifact 8389587300 contained ScadMill_0.0.0_aarch64.dmg (3,806,919 bytes), matching sidecar SHA-256 F1EEB567F2394DAF10994C66B6043B1D909A177D97B967E9593D94D993CA0C5D. The authoritative run completed successfully across the web, native, both browser OS lanes, signed Windows setup, DMG, and AppImage; no rerun was issued. The DMG remains unsigned and unnotarized pending owner credentials.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
